Off Calendar May-18-2004 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award And For Rehearing
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER HEALTH NET, INC., AFFILIATES PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR REHEARING.
APPEARANCE: John J. Weber, Esq. 213/250-1800 for petitioner & moving party; Ali Taheripour, Esq. 818/559-4477 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENY. Award confirmed. Prevailing party to prepare proposed order, judgment, & statement of decision. (302/REQ/AA) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs And Sanctions,Respondents
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT STANFORD UNIVERSITY HOSPITAL, STANFORD HOSPITAL AND CLINICS Motion For Costs And Sanctions Pursuant to C.C.P. Section 128.6(a) AND C.C.P. Section 128.7(h).
APPEARANCE: John J. Weber, Esq. 213/250-1800 for petitioner & opposing party; Ali Taheripour, Esq. 818/559-4477 for respondents & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied sanctions. As to fees & costs, separate motion must be made. (302/REQ/AA) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
